name: player-coupe
prompt: Top-down orthographic game sprite for a neon arcade racer. TRUE bird's-eye / satellite view, camera locked straight down at 90 degrees, flat, zero perspective, NOT 3/4. One car, centered, nose toward the TOP, filling ~85% of frame. Flat even lighting, crisp hard edges, subtle neon rim light. A sleek low sports coupe, glossy hot orange-red (#ff3300), cyan underglow, dark windshield, premium hero silhouette. Solid uniform magenta #FF00FF background, no gradient. NO shadow, ground, reflection, motion blur, text, logos, or brands. Square framing.

name: traffic-sedan
prompt: Top-down orthographic game sprite for a neon arcade racer, TRUE bird's-eye view, camera straight down 90 degrees, flat, zero perspective. One car centered, nose to the TOP, fills ~85%. Solid uniform magenta #FF00FF background. NO shadow/ground/reflection/motion blur/text/logo/brand. Square framing.

name: traffic-muscle
